examples: Shopping for sure to be on top of my list, which I did today by replenishing food storage for the coming days, coming home with armload of eateries and a great deal of Halloween spirits.
At one point he scooped up an armload of his son's stuffed animals, saying he wanted to take them home with him.
You can bet NTT DoCoMo has an armload of new devices to announce -- it's almost a tradition.
